sandbox.explainer: Sandbox prevents destructive commands (rm -rf, dd, mkfs). By default it's off — most models won't destroy your system, and we provide backup guidance instead of blocking you.

backup.suggestion: Consider Timeshift (apt install timeshift) for system snapshots, or rsync to an external drive. The install.sh creates systemd MCP services — back up /opt/ai-core/ and /etc/systemd/system/ai-mcp-*.service
